prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软 科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第144名→2026年第87名，近年排名提升显著，对考生吸引力增强；2023年曾因教师不配合核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情；2024 年声誉转为中性/混合，分数线持续上涨；抖音热度排名第32（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；第五轮学科评估中海南大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，与该校招生专业高度重合；江苏省2026 年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年约35.8万大幅增长约45%，物理类考生估算约37.9万，竞争显著加剧；海南大学位于海南省海口市，与江苏省跨省，地域偏好因素不显著；该校在江苏省招生规模中等，2025年物理类52人、历史类30人，非本地生源 主力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、江苏省考生总数大幅增长约45%导致竞争加剧、学校排名上升带来吸引力增强等因素，在202 5年基准39620名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约40000名，区间39600–40400名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 41356 → 36535 → 37931 → 39109 → 39620. In the past three years, it has shown a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3100 places. The baseline for 2025 is about 39620. The enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 74, 64, 40, 46, and 52 respectively, with significant fluctuations. The 2026 plan is 52, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising continuously, from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident due to a teacher's non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing. In 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed, and the admission score line continued to rise. Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's enrollment majors. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to about 358,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 379,000, with significantly intensified competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, across provinces from Jiangsu, with no significant regional preference factor. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu Province is medium, with 52 Physics Category and 30 History Category students in 2025, not the main source of non-local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 45% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising ranking, the ranking is expected to continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 39620. The predicted minimum ranking is about 40000, with a range of 39600–40400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 39600–40400, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 popular majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 39000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 40400), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature is divided between wait-and-see and recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to approximately 358,000 in 2025; the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 141,000, an increase of about 45.4% compared to 97,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, which is a different province from Jiangsu, so regional preference factors are not significant; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu Province is moderate, with 30 History Category and 52 Physics Category students in 2025, not a major source of local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift of historical rankings, the approximately 13.3% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan partially alleviating competition, the significant increase of about 45% in the total number of Jiangsu Province candidates intensifying competition, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising ranking, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10175, with a range of 9775–10575.
